benefits: Access to a 100+ member collaborative network
Annual hackathon with real industry exposure
Open-source project contributions and live deployments

faqs.question: What is CodeX?
faqs.answer: CodeX is a community of tech enthusiasts and developers aiming to foster innovation and learning.

faqs.question: How can I join?
faqs.answer: You can join by filling out the registration form on our website when recruitments are open.

faqs.question: Do I need prior coding experience?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily! We welcome beginners who are eager to learn, as well as experienced developers.

faqs.question: Are there any membership fees?
faqs.answer: No, joining CodeX is completely free for all students.

register.description: Initialize your profile and secure your position in the CodeX network.

about.title: About CodeX
about.description: CodeX is the official technical club of the Department of Computer Science & Engineering and Computer Applications at Quantum University, Roorkee.
about.mission: Our mission is to serve as a hub for students passionate about programming, software development, and emerging technologies. We bridge the gap between abstract logic and hardware reality, providing students with opportunities to collaborate on real-world, live projects, and build professional portfolios.

activities.title: Technical Events
activities.description: We organize various activities including hackathons (such as the annual Q-Hackathon), coding marathons, technical quizzes, and project showcases.

activities.title: Skill Development
activities.description: Members engage with a wide range of technologies, including Python, C++, React JS, Flutter, Android development, AI, ML, IoT, Cybersecurity, and UI/UX design.

activities.title: CodeFest Series
activities.description: An exclusive series to foster collaboration and allow students to demonstrate their expertise in specialized domains.

about.contact: Contact us at codex.club@quantumeducation.in or follow us on Instagram @codexclub

contact.description: Have a question or want to collaborate? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
